audit_items.proof_trace: The `s_entered` boolean is set to `true` at L418 before any external call (safeTransfer L444, auctionCallback L449, safeTransferFrom L453) and cleared only at L457 after all external calls complete. Any nested invocation of `bid()` will unconditionally hit the `if (s_entered) revert Errors.ReentrantCall()` guard at L415-416, and Solidity's storage rollback on revert ensures no persistent lock can form. All paths to `bid()` are external-only, with no bypass.
